omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When you visit sites or use apps that use Google Analytics, a Google Analytics customer may choose to enable Google to link information about your activity from that site or app with activity from other sites or apps that use our ad services.

If you're a student or work for an organization that uses Google services, your domain administrator and resellers who manage your account will have access to your Google Account. They may be able to:
•
Access and retain information stored in your account, like your email
•
View statistics regarding your account, like how many apps you install
•
Change your account password
•
Suspend or terminate your account access
•
•
Receive your account information in order to satisfy applicable law, regulation, legal
process, or enforceable governmental request
Restrict your ability to delete or edit your information or your privacy settings

When you visit sites or use apps that use Google Analytics, a Google Analytics customer may choose to enable Google to link information about your activity from that site or app with activity from other sites or apps that use our ad services.
